message:
test(conformance): add memory_ops and regex_glob_ops fixture tests

Adds direct fixture execution tests for memory_ops.json (memcpy, memmove,
memset, memcmp, memchr) and regex_glob_ops.json (regcomp, regexec,
fnmatch, glob). Uses normalize_expected() to handle mixed output types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
